T. 17011/40/2019-T1.ft-1] ftrxfat : PRTTI 1 ziffq., 3T44M-17711 '4-11 4 1 II .4j - 3, (i) I I. 676(3T) 9Tfi 14 H-c,s1,., 2004-4-11171-"F'9 1.1,. 14,0: 1 4998 G112019 -- 1 of 2 -- THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY 'PART II-SFC. 3( ill MINISTRY OF HOME AFFAIRS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 25th September. 2019 G.S.R. 690(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by clause (d) of sub-section (2) of section 52 of the Unlawful Activities (Prevention) Act, 1967 (37 of 1967), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules to amend the Procedure for Admission and Disposal of Application Rules, 2004, namely:- 1. Short title and commencement.—(I) These rules may he called the Procedure for Admission and Disposal of Application (Amendment) Rules, 2019. (II) They shall come into force on the date of their Publication in the Official Gazette. In the Procedure for Admission and Disposal of Application Rules. 2004, in rule 2. in sub-rule (2) after the word "organizatior ", the words "from the First Schedule or as the case may he, the name of an individual from the Fourth Schedule" shall he inserted. IF. No. 17011/40/2019-CT-11 PIYUSH GOYAL. It. Secy. Note : The Principal rules were published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary. Part II. Section 3, Sub-section (i) vide number G.S.R. 676 (E) dated the l4'h October, 2004. Uploaded by Dte. of Printing at Government of India Press. Ring Road. Mayapuri, New Delhi-I 10064 and Published by the Controller of Publications. Delhi-I 10054. IvIAKICU KUMAR VERMA -- 2 of 2 --
